archimate:Driver.name: Creation of Interoperable European Solutions
archimate:Driver.documentation:
Definition: The Creation of Interoperable European Solutions Driver represents an external or internal condition that motivates the public organisation to define its goals and implement the changes necessary to create Digital Public Services.
Source: ArchiMate
Source reference: https://pubs.opengroup.org/architecture/archimate3-doc/index.html
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Viewpoint: Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/CreationOfInteroperableEuropeanSolutionsDriver
ABB name: eira:CreationOfInteroperableEuropeanSolutionsDriver
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/CreationOfInteroperableEuropeanSolutionsDriver
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: The Creation of Interoperable European Solutions Driver represents an external or internal condition that motivates the public organisation to define its goals and implement the changes necessary to create Digital Public Services.
Enterprise Architecture Framework alignment guidelines viewpoint
